base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of projectile_spread — a projectile from 1987 contra. S (spread-gun) — 5 simultaneous diverging shots, iconic Contra weapon. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: S (spread-gun) — 5 simultaneous diverging shots, iconic Contra weapon
